sessionStart.command: command -v oak-dev >/dev/null 2>&1 && oak-dev ci hook sessionStart --agent cursor || true

beforeSubmitPrompt.command: command -v oak-dev >/dev/null 2>&1 && oak-dev ci hook beforeSubmitPrompt --agent cursor || true

afterFileEdit.command: command -v oak-dev >/dev/null 2>&1 && oak-dev ci hook afterFileEdit --agent cursor || true

afterAgentResponse.command: command -v oak-dev >/dev/null 2>&1 && oak-dev ci hook afterAgentResponse --agent cursor || true

afterAgentThought.command: command -v oak-dev >/dev/null 2>&1 && oak-dev ci hook afterAgentThought --agent cursor || true

postToolUse.command: command -v oak-dev >/dev/null 2>&1 && oak-dev ci hook postToolUse --agent cursor || true

preCompact.command: command -v oak-dev >/dev/null 2>&1 && oak-dev ci hook preCompact --agent cursor || true

stop.command: command -v oak-dev >/dev/null 2>&1 && oak-dev ci hook stop --agent cursor || true

sessionEnd.command: command -v oak-dev >/dev/null 2>&1 && oak-dev ci hook sessionEnd --agent cursor || true

postToolUseFailure.command: command -v oak-dev >/dev/null 2>&1 && oak-dev ci hook postToolUseFailure --agent cursor || true

subagentStart.command: command -v oak-dev >/dev/null 2>&1 && oak-dev ci hook subagentStart --agent cursor || true

subagentStop.command: command -v oak-dev >/dev/null 2>&1 && oak-dev ci hook subagentStop --agent cursor || true
